title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Oberoi Realty - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Sales Manager Vacancy at Oberoi Realty - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
Oberoi Realty has an exciting opening for a Sales Manager at our Rajkot office. Join a company that values innovation, collaboration, and continuous learning.

About Oberoi Realty:
Oberoi Realty is a leading organization in the On-site sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Coordinate with architects, contractors, and project teams
• Provide advisory services on property investment and market trends
• Build relationships with channel partners and brokers
• Liaise with banks and NBFCs for home loan assistance to customers
• Conduct land acquisition due diligence and feasibility studies
• Prepare presentations and proposals for institutional clients
• Maintain a pipeline of qualified leads using CRM software

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• B.Com / M.Com / MBA Finance
• 0-1 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in Client Relationship Management
• Proficiency in Market Research
• Proficiency in Due Diligence
• Proficiency in Lease Administration
• Proficiency in Sales Techniques
• Proficiency in Contract Management
• Proficiency in Property Valuation
• Proficiency in GIS Tools

Work Mode: On-site - Work from our office

What We Offer:
• Provident Fund and Gratuity as per company policy
• Annual paid leaves and casual leaves
• Company-sponsored certifications
• Learning & development budget
• Flexible working hours
• Professional development and training programs
• Salary Range: 2.5 LPA - 6 LPA per annum

Location: Rajkot, Gujarat, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Oberoi Realty!
